opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My skin is completely yellow, I am itching so badly I'm bleeding, and I have this deep, boring pain in my stomach that shoots straight through to my spine.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The yellow got much worse today and tonight the deep pain came on so badly I can't lie down or sleep, and the itching is unbearable — my spouse rang for help.

symptom_narrative.onset: the yellowing crept in over the past week and deepened a lot today; the deep stomach-to-back pain started tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: about a week of yellowing and itching; the severe pain has been going for a few hours tonight
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, dull, boring pain in the upper belly that bores straight through to the middle of the back; the skin is intensely itchy all over
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is severe and relentless and stops me sleeping; the itch is so bad I've scratched myself until I bleed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: upper middle of the tummy, going straight through to the mid-back; the yellow and itch are everywhere
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and not letting up; nothing I do changes it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — sitting leaning forward helps the back pain a tiny bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat in bed makes the back pain worse, so I've been pacing
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my urine has gone dark like Coca-Cola and my bowel motions have turned pale and clay-coloured; I've lost a lot of weight and gone right off my food
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before — this has all built up over the last couple of months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't sleep, I can't lie in bed, I'm pacing the room in distress

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recently told I've developed diabetes, which surprised me because I've never had sugar problems and don't have the usual risk factors
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: in the last couple of months

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: I don't drink much alcohol at all
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I've lost about 10 kg over the last two months without trying and my appetite has fallen away; my spouse is here with me

objective_data_offered.value: skin and the whites of the eyes look deeply yellow all over
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held phone image over chat; lighting and screen colour make jaundice hard to judge reliably and it is no substitute for an in-person examination

objective_data_offered.value: arms and trunk are covered in scratch marks, some of them bleeding, from constant itching
my urine has gone very dark, like Coca-Cola
my bowel motions have turned pale, almost clay- or putty-coloured
no fever, no shaking chills or teeth-chattering, and I'm not confused or drowsy right now
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own impression without a measured temperature; a home thermometer reading was not available

objective_data_offered.value: I've lost about 10 kg over the last two months without trying
spouse reports the patient is pacing the room and cannot lie down or sleep because of the pain, and looks very unwell and yellow
